title: Crispy Mustardy Bake
description: A deliciously easy-to-make bake dish with a crispy topping and mustardy flavor.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together Crispy Mustardy Bake Mixture, Quick Cheese, and Mustard.
Add Bake and Simmered Sauce to the mixture and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes.
While the bake is baking, prepare the crispy topping by mixing together Crispy Mustardy Bake Mixture and Bake.
Once the bake is done, top it with the crispy mixture and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
